title: Xtra Creamy Saudi Arabian Red Potatoes Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Saudi Arabian dish featuring red potatoes, this gratin is perfect for a cold winter night, it is kosher friendly and can be served as a side dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced red potatoes and melted unsalted butter, toss until they are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, mix the heavy cream, grated cheddar cheese, sour cream, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Pour some of the cream mixture over the potatoes, then sprinkle with some chopped parsley.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cream on top.
Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil over the top layer of cream.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
